name: housekeep
description: Small Claude Code skills for keeping your dev workflow tidy: todo, do, papercut, audit-permission-requests, setup-housekeep (installs a read-only local-search MCP — ripgrep-backed Grep/Glob with path-allowlist gating, and optionally wires the prefer-dedicated-tools Bash hook and audit-permission-requests log hook), plus the prefer-dedicated-tools hook script itself.
